text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Here's a Pearl question for you. Who's the biggest
lover of regional bento in the world? That's right,
me.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Second Pearl question! Who requested the school
store to stock regional bento? That's right, me.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Last one! When the buyer insisted "regional bento
should be eaten in their home regions," who made
them see the error of their ways? That's right, me.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Eat the regional bento, know the region. I showed
them a whole new world of bento. Heh, our souls
came to an understanding.
